flag:bridge-fixed.description: Woodcutter has repaired the river bridge at overworld tile [32,28].

flag:castle-armory-seen.description: The player has inspected the old armory standard that names the true dungeon seal.

flag:castle-letters-cleared.description: Castle Scribe Elowen has confirmed the library and armory signs point to the dungeon stair.

flag:castle-library-read.description: The player has read the castle library archive page about the dungeon seal.

flag:fern-mender-greeted.description: Linnet Fernwise has taught the player why the Deep Forest lower track keeps fern-lamps lit.

flag:has-dungeon-key.description: Player holds the brass dungeon key dropped by the Desert Wyrm; unlocks the castle gate.

flag:morning-errands-done.description: Page Pip's morning errand has been carried from the village green to the shop and back.

flag:oldwood-oath-sworn.description: The Oldwood Hermit's road oath has been carried past the first forest raiders.

flag:oldwood-roadward-mark.description: The Oldwood roadward has tied Oswin's blue oat-string into the first forest bend.

flag:oldwood-waystone-read.description: The player has read the mossy waystone at the first Oldwood bend.

flag:ruin-mural-read.description: The player has read Pilgrim Safra's Sunken Road mural inside the desert ruins.

flag:lost-page-guided.description: Lost Page Rowan has been guided from the Deep Forest oak back toward the old road.

flag:shop-sample-claimed.description: Hearthwake shopkeeper has already given the player the one-time travel cake sample.

flag:stable-oats-bought.description: The player has bought Oswin's oat bundle, giving Hearthwake's stable service a later story echo.

flag:sunken-cart-read.description: The player has read a splintered Sunken Road cart ledger.

flag:tavern-song-learned.description: Merrin has explained the hearth-song board's errand verse to the player.

flag:village-letter-basket-read.description: The player has read the doorstep letter-basket note beside Hearthwake's shop road.
